name: Striped with Tassels Kids' Shower Curtain Blue - Pillowfort™: Twill, Machine Wash, Buttonhole Top, OEKO-TEX Certified
description: Add some nautical notes to your bath space with this Striped with Tassels Shower Curtain from Pillowfort™. The twill shower curtain is adorned with embroidered, tassel-tipped horizontal stripes popping from the crisp white backdrop in blue shades to beautifully enclose a bathtub or shower stall for added privacy with a refreshing vibe. Made from a recycled polyester-cotton blend, the decorative shower curtain features a buttonhole top for easy installation, and is machine washable for a quick refresh whenever needed.
